title: ophrys × saratoi subsp. gelmii
intro: Ophrys × saratoi subsp. gelmii, also known as the Spanish orchid or bee orchid, is a type of orchid hybrid that belongs to the Ophrys genus and is native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ophrys × saratoi subsp. gelmii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
